goal: Add additive ML-to-scanner contract path without breaking scanner consumers when ML signals are absent.

scanner_path.change: scanner confidence column and min_confidence filter now coalesce additive ML signal keys (ml_influence_score, ml_confidence) after legacy confidence.
scanner_path.compatibility: legacy confidence remains first-priority; behavior is unchanged when ML keys are absent.

api_contract_path.change: scanner recommendations now expose additive ML fields: mlInfluenceScore, mlInfluenceReason, effectiveConfidence.
api_contract_path.fallback: effectiveConfidence equals legacy confidence when no ML signal is present; ML fields stay null.

deterministic_assertions.detail: scanner SQL contract includes additive ml_influence_score/ml_confidence confidence fallback and filter extraction.
ML-absent recommendation keeps fallback behavior: mlInfluenceScore/mlInfluenceReason null and effectiveConfidence mirrors confidence.
ML-present recommendation carries ML signal into mlInfluenceScore/mlInfluenceReason and computes effectiveConfidence blend.
